subject: Fermi  trigger No 755277791: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, N.Tiurina,  P.Balanutsa, , D.Vlasenko, I.Panchenko,
A.Kuznetsov,  G.Antipov,  A.Sankovich, A.Sosnovskij, Yu.Tselik, M.Gulyaev, Ya.Kechin,
V.Senik, A.Chasovnikov, K.Labsina, I. Gorbunov (Lomonosov MSU),
O.Gress, N.Budnev (ISU),
C.Francile,  F. Podesta, R.Podesta, E. Gonzalez  (Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar (OAFA),
A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov (Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),
A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov (Blagoveschensk Educational StateUniversity)
D.Buckley (SAAO),
R.Rebolo (The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),
L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241207.64 (trigger No 755277791,20h 45m 07.20s , -31d 10m 12.0s, R=16.02) errorbox  11094 sec after notice time and 11134 sec after trigger time at 2024-12-07 18:28:40 UT, with upper limit up to  17.9 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 50 deg. The sun  altitude  is -10.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -37 deg., longitude l = 13 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2699461

We obtain a following upper limits.

   11885 | 2024-12-07 18:40:41 |         MASTER-SAAO | (20h 50m 38.37s , -38d 53m 13.2s) |   C |    60 | 17.9 |        
Filter C is a clear (unfiltred) band. 


The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
